bird.summary: The red-masked parakeet (Psittacara erythrogenys) is a medium-sized parrot from Ecuador and Peru. It is popular as a pet and are better kno…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 秘鲁

relations.subject: Red-masked parakeet
relations.evidence: These birds are native to southwestern Ecuador and northwestern Peru, where they primarily live in jungle and deciduous forest

relations.subject: Red-masked parakeet

relations.subject: Red-masked parakeet
relations.evidence: This is due to declining populations brought by widespread local pet trade in Peru and Ecuador, which has contributed to habitat loss and fragmentation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
